posts.text:
My Black Grandfather who worked for a company that used black men as free labor b4 his time is somehow accountable cuz he made sure I knew the horrible past.  U a real fried egg brain ass niggER 🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣


EllisCaliforniaJones (@EllisCaliJones)

It seemed knew what he was doing, he was apart of the problem nigga deal with it.



— https://nitter.net/EllisCaliJones/status/2034063324715827314#m

God bless black love

Cuz she ain't a freaking Quitter!  We got a G in the A. Love her!

The Facts Dude 🤙🏽 (@Thefactsdude)

Afroman Lays Down Facts: Wrapping up his time on the stand, Afroman drops hard truths

As his time on the stand wrapped up today, Afroman decided to let the prosecution hear it.

If the deputies wanted to avoid public scrutiny, they shouldn’t have kicked down his door and stolen his money.

“I have a right to kick a can in my backyard, use my freedom of speech, turn my bad times into good times. Yes, I do…and I think I’m a sport for doin

Pay Up, Unc! AND take her a box of Bank Head Seafood This Friday!


No Arby’s or Almond Joy Slander Please! (@ChefSuchNSuch)

I always told my niece that if she got straight A's I would give her $500.  She really did it, in this economy!!!

  




— https://nitter.net/ChefSuchNSuch/status/2033993631950876805#m

It's the King!


T.I. (@Tip)

We so #TrueToAtlanta WE made Magic in the City last night. #LetEmKnow #HadToBeThere

Thank U.  I simply seek to see where does our cultured outrage begin and end. Ya know

loved your IG post pointing out the busty sports bars making MILLIONS.



— https://nitter.net/andyperry/status/2034048315373830325#m

I LOVE ATLANTA. There is no place on earth like it and u love that. 🤣🫡


Sports Business Journal (@SBJ)

Despite the NBA canceling the Hawks’ planned Magic City promotion, fans showed up in themed gear, with demand for merch surging at State Farm Arena 🏀

The night still drew 18,138 fans, and T.I. performed at halftime as originally planned.

Via @AP_Sports | ow.ly/j7Vy50YvetN





— https://nitter.net/SBJ/status/2033913871090495550#m

My Grandfather worked (paid) for this company as a dump truck driver and told me of it's dark past


UATL (@itsuatl)

Some Atlanta bricks still hold the fingerprints of Black men and boys forced into unpaid labor after the Civil War. At Chattahoochee Brick, incarcerated workers made 200,000 bricks a day. Now descendants are fighting for a memorial. @ajc’s @NajjaNotes reports.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/itsuatl/status/2033928478693986660#m

🤣 I love Atlantans


ATLSCOOP (@ATL_SCOOP)

Still salty about Magic City Night getting cancelled 🤣





— https://nitter.net/ATL_SCOOP/status/2033746688347632076#m

I bet this is a Clara Muhammad school! Beautiful


GEN (@GEN80)

THE ELEVATED PLACES
Independent schools for our people

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/GEN80/status/2033483150924411226#m

Riding this classic day b4 yesterday


ᝰ (@ParisEighty)

thoughts on this album?





— https://nitter.net/ParisEighty/status/2033439874339242198#m
Congratulations & God Bless him

@theswagshopedgewood has always been about more than cuts — it’s about community. Atlanta helped us establish roots, and now we’re honoring those same values as we grow. Big love to @Square for being part of the journey. #ad

I woke up with ‘Mania on my Mind. This beat is so cold I had to kill it. Don’t trip Cody, minor setback for a major comeback and congrats to Jey for getting his first World Title! Inspired By Old Atlanta & TBS! #wrestling #codyrhodes #jeyuso #rap #atlanta
Had to get bro right before his show in the A tomorrow @Tommy Richman
Super rare throwback #netflix #comedy #triggerwarning
To laugh at another man’s fault is to make their same mistake yourself..#addiction #killamike #runthejewels
Outside w the legends! #wwe
Out here #wwe
Shoutout my boy stacks! #andre3000 #scientistsandengineers #grammy #rap
